---
name: Partnership inquiry
about: A sponsored playbook, a collab, a themed drop, or a team setup — start here
title: Partnership inquiry
labels: partnership
---

**Format** (sponsored playbook / collab playbook / themed drop / Goal Prompts for Teams):

**Who you are** (tool, company, or creator):

**What you have in mind** (a sequence, a theme, a timeline — rough is fine):

**Prefer to talk privately?** Say so — this issue can stay a one-liner and the
maintainer will follow up with you directly. Formats and specs are on
[/partners](https://goal-prompts.vercel.app/partners); the team offer is on
[/teams](https://goal-prompts.vercel.app/teams).
